title: dumortieriales
intro: The Dumortieriales is an order of plants, specifically a group of liverworts characterized by their thallose gametophyte stage and leafy sporophyte stage. This order consists of a diverse range of species, including those within the family Marchantiaceae, which is often considered to be within the Dumortieriales order. However, some taxonomists also group the families Orchidaceae, Euphorbiaceae, and Cyperaceae within the Dumortieriales order, although this classification can be somewhat contentious. The Dumortieriales order is typically associated with the liverwort group, which is distinct from the more commonly recognized vascular plant orders such as the Magnoliopsida and Poales.

families.family_desc: Drosophyllaceae is a family of plants commonly known as the sun-loving bladderworts.
